creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
I like it, Toni, thanks.  A few suggestions:

--just use LIB_DEPENDS instead of {BUILD,RUN}_DEPENDS
--respect CC, NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES, and INSTALL permissions
--rely on existing MAKE_ENV for some variables, rather than passing them
in explicitly via MAKE_ARGS
--with one file in the packing list, ditch pkg-plist in favor of
PLIST_FILES
--minor grammar nits in pkg-descr

Revised shar attached.
